title: Terrain Analysis Report
description: Output of `terrain analyze --json`. The canonical source of truth for the report shape is the Go type `analyze.Report` defined in `internal/analyze/analyze.go`; this schema is a permissive stub that pins only the schemaVersion contract. Adopters who want strict per-field validation should generate from the Go types directly. Field-level stability tiers are documented in `docs/schema/FIELD_TIERS.md`.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version of the analyze report. Currently the string "2". Version 2 added the additive field `gateRelevantSummary`.

repository.description: Repository identification (name, branch, commit SHA, languages, frameworks, CI systems detected). See `analyze.RepositoryInfo` in `internal/analyze/analyze.go` for the full field list.

dataCompleteness.description: Inventory of which input data sources were available for this run (snapshot, coverage, runtime, baseline, etc.). Each entry is `{ name, available }`.

testsDetected.description: Validation-asset summary: test file count, test case count, code unit count, scenario count, code surface count, framework breakdown.

repoProfile.description: Repository profile classification (test volume, CI pressure, coverage confidence, redundancy, fanout, skip burden, flake burden, manual coverage, graph density).

coverageConfidence.description: Structural coverage confidence summary (high/medium/low file counts).

weakCoverageAreas.description: Source paths with poor structural coverage.

ciOptimization.description: Estimated CI savings (duplicate-tests-removable, skipped-tests-reviewable, high-fanout-nodes, recommendation text).

topInsight.description: Single-sentence top opportunity. Superseded by keyFindings; retained for backward compat.

keyFindings.description: Top-3 prioritized findings shown inline in `analyze` output. Each entry: `{ title, severity, category, pillar?, metric? }`.

totalFindingCount.description: Total findings count (including those not shown in keyFindings).

signalSummary.description: Severity + category breakdowns of every detected signal: `{ total, critical, high, medium, low, byCategory: {ai, health, migration, quality, structure, ...} }`. This is the full report count for display. For CI gate decisions (`--fail-on=*`), consult `gateRelevantSummary` instead — observability-tier findings appear here for visibility but never block the gate.

gateRelevantSummary.description: (schema v2+) Same shape as `signalSummary` but excludes signals from detectors that ship at observability tier. The `--fail-on=<severity>` gate decision is computed from this object.

stabilityClusters.description: Unstable-test clustering by shared root cause.

edgeCases.description: Structural anomalies that affect analysis confidence.

limitations.description: Free-text notes about incompleteness in this run.

headline.description: Single-sentence opinionated summary of the test system state.

nextActions.description: Up to 3 prioritized next-step recommendations with runnable commands.
